EmailTemplate.description: Confirmation of discounted underwriter premium applied.
EmailTemplate.name: Premium Support - Confirmation
EmailTemplate.subject: Premium Support Confirmation
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Please accept this email as confirmation that we have applied the discounted premium to your account.
(Delete as required) To confirm, our underwriters have agreed to credit your credit card /debit card account with a payment of £0.00 which you can expect to receive in the next 3 to 5 working days. This is the equivalent of 60 days’ worth of your base premium (excluding any add-ons).
(Delete as required) To confirm, our underwriters have agreed to credit your bank account with a payment of £0.00 to your bank account which you can expect to receive in the next 3 to 5 working days. This is the equivalent of 60 days’ worth of your base premium (excluding any legal expenses and/or cyber liability add-ons). Please note that your payment schedule with Close Brothers will continue as planned, this credit is intended to help cover instalments for the next two months.
If you require further support, Close Brothers have a one-month payment holiday scheme in place. If you wish to apply for a one month payment holiday, you will need to contact Close Brothers on 0333 321 8566 (Option 1) or via this link: https://d2cjxhvv9uqb7.cloudfront.net/. Close Brothers will advise what the next steps are, but if you do have any problems in the meantime, please do not hesitate to contact us on 01242 808 740.
Please contact us if you have any further queries.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
